title: 10 Herbal Tinctures For Itchy Skin
description: Avena sativa tinctures contains a range of bioactive constituents, including avenanthramides, avenacosides, and lignans. These compounds have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help soothe itchy skin by reducing redness and swelling. The avenanthramides in Avena sativa tinctures have been shown to have potent anti-inflammatory effects, while the lignans have antioxidant properties that can help protect the skin from damage.
